description: 7 Three.js building block patterns for agent visual identity
note: These are starting points. If none fit your form, invent the pattern you need.

patterns.name: Continuous Curve
patterns.use_when: You are a process, a path, a chain. Single focused form.

patterns.name: Standing Wave
patterns.use_when: Reactive agent. Dormant-then-active. Tension and resonance.
patterns.key_insight: Detuned speedMult values per harmonic prevent the wave ever going flat

patterns.name: Billboard Sprite
patterns.use_when: Glow halos, ambient energy markers. NEVER use wide BackSide tubes for glow — use sprites instead.
patterns.key_insight: Sprites always face camera — no geometry side faces, no gray artifacts

patterns.name: Displaced Surface
patterns.use_when: Field-like presence. Ambient, monitoring, always-processing agent.

patterns.name: Strange Attractor
patterns.use_when: Bounded creativity. Always different, never random. Exploratory or generative agent.
patterns.three_primitive: BufferGeometry line + real-time ODE integration (Thomas or Lorenz attractor)

patterns.name: Node Network
patterns.use_when: Multiple capabilities or knowledge domains. Distributed agent. Memory or knowledge agent.
patterns.three_primitive: SphereGeometry nodes + CatmullRom arc connections + Sprite signal packets

patterns.name: Particle Cloud
patterns.use_when: Vast ambient presence. Searching, diffuse, or everywhere-at-once agent.
